message.content:
# Delhi Hospital A NABH Accredited Multispeciality Hospital Delhi-Rohatkal Road, Bahadurgarh-124507(HR) Ph: 01276-230607 **Timings:** 8.00 A.M. To 7.00 P.M. Sunday: 9.00 A.M. To 3.00 P.M. **COMPLETE RANGE OF BIOCHEMISTRY, MICROBIOLOGY, HAEMATOLOGY, SEROLOGY, CYTOLOGY, HISTOPATHOLOGY** Delhi-Rohatkal Road BAHADURGARH-124507 (HARYANA) | Date | Dr. RAHUL | Sr. No. 59 | Age 40 Yrs. | Sex F | |------|-----------|------------|-------------|------| ## LIVER FUNCTION TEST
TEST VALUE UNIT RANGE
TOTAL BILIRUBIN 1.2 mg/dl 0.3 - 1.2
CONJUGATED (D. Bilirubin) 0.5 mg/dl 0.00 - 0.2
UNCONJUGATED (I.D. Bilirubin) 0.7 mg/dl 0.3 - 1.0
TOTAL PROTEINS 7.7 gm/dl 6.4 - 8.3
ALBUMIN 4.0 gm/dl 3.5 - 5.2
GLOBULIN 3.7 gm/dl 2.3 - 3.5
A/G RATIO 1.081 0.8 - 2.0
S.G.O.T (AST) 28.0 U/L 0.00 - 50.0
S.G.P.T (ALT) 19.0 U/L 0.00 - 50.0
ALKALINE PHOSPHATASE 63.0 U/L 53.0 - 128.0
G G T P 11.0 U/L 0.0 - 55.0
Dr. Rahul Chandra Bhana Kanawade Consultant Physician MBBS, DNB Reg. No. DNB-87743 CONSULTANT PATHOLOGIST - CLINICAL CORRELATION IS ESSENTIAL FOR FINAL DIAGNOSIS. - MORE THAN 12 HOURS OVERNIGHT FASTING CONDITION IS REQUIRED FOR E.S.R., BLOOD TRIGLYCERIDES, LIPID PROFILE, T3, T4 TSH, IRON & HORMONES. - HEMOLYZED SERUM MAY FALSELY ELEVATE POSTASPIRIN, IRON, S.G.O.T., S.G.P.T., LDH AND PHOSPHATASE. - LIPIDIC SERUM MAY FALSELY ELEVATE ALKALINE PHOSPHATASE S.G.O.T., CALCIUM, TOTAL PROTEINS AND CREATININE AND MAY FALSELY LOWER TOTAL BILIRUBIN. - THIS REPORT IS FOR THE PERSUAL OF DOCTORS ONLY NOT FOR MEDICOLEGAL CASES. - WE USE DISPOSABLE SYRINGES AND NEEDLES ONLY. 24 HOURS EMERGENCY SERVICES AVAILABLE
